ads.title: Stern Star Wars Pinball Machine - Home Edition
ads.description: For sale is a Star Wars Home Edition Stern pinball machine in like new condition. All parts, lights, audio, and flippers are working perfectly. Sound has been upgraded, this machine features two front speakers and a subwoofer. The factory default for this machine is a single mono speaker with no subwoofer, so the sound upgrade makes a big difference to the audio. Machine comes with the owners manual and rule sheet. I am the original owner of this machine and it was purchased in April 2023 and has only 353 total plays on it (see screen shot). It has been stored in doors in a smoke free and pet free home and features no cosmetic damage. Please note the Home Edition does not accept quarters, it stays on Free Play, just press the Start button to begin. Up to 4 players can play against each other and the game supports various multi-ball modes. Game is for local pickup only at my address, I cannot ship it or deliver it as I do not own a truck. Buyer can test the game and make sure they are satisfied with it before purchase, but once it leaves my house, all sales are final. Payment accepted through Cash App. Dimensions: 70 inches high, 28 inches wide, and 53 inches deep. The legs can be removed and the head of the machine can be folded down so that it can fit in the back of most vans or any truck. Machine weighs approximately 220 pounds.

ads.author: Patrick DeCristo
ads.title: Fender Limited Edition Fender x PAC-MAN Player II Telecaster
ads.description: Fender Limited Edition Fender x PAC-MAN Player II Telecaster $1549 + shipping *No Trades Please* Fender’s initial release consisted of only 65 guitars worldwide, and they sold out within minutes of launch. This limited edition Fender x PAC-MAN Player II Telecaster is in mint condition and was only removed from the box for testing and photography. There are no cosmetic blemishes to note anywhere on the instrument. Includes the original Fender gig bag, factory paperwork, and will be shipped in the original Fender shipping box. Created in collaboration with Bandai Namco, this incredibly limited Fender x PAC-MAN release celebrates one of the most iconic video games of all time with a bold, collectible twist on the legendary Telecaster platform. Designed to bridge generations of players and collectors alike, this model combines unmistakable PAC-MAN nostalgia with the modern playability and performance of the Player II Series. Whether you’re a serious collector, lifelong gamer, or working musician looking for something truly unique, this Telecaster delivers both visual impact and professional-level functionality. The guitar features a comfortable Modern “C” neck profile, a 9.5” radius fingerboard with rolled edges, and 22 medium jumbo frets for smooth, effortless playability. The body showcases vibrant PAC-MAN arcade graphics on the front, while the classic PAC-MAN logo adorns the back, making this one of the most visually distinctive Fender collaborations ever produced. Equipped with Player Series Alnico V Single-Coil Telecaster pickups, this guitar produces the classic Tele tone players expect — crisp highs, punchy mids, and tight, articulate lows. A 3-way blade switch, 6-saddle bridge, and Fender ClassicGear tuners provide reliable tuning stability and versatile tonal control for both studio and stage use. Features include: Limited Edition Fender x PAC-MAN collaboration Extremely limited initial run of only 65 guitars Modern “C” maple neck 9.5” fingerboard radius with rolled edges 22 medium jumbo frets Player Series Alnico V Telecaster single-coil pickups 3-way blade switch 6-saddle Telecaster bridge Fender ClassicGear tuners PAC-MAN artwork on front and logo on back Original Fender gig bag and paperwork included A rare and highly collectible collaboration that perfectly blends arcade nostalgia with classic Fender craftsmanship.

ads.description: Original Japanese release of Starblade for the Sega Mega-CD / Sega CD, released in 1994 by Namco. This classic sci-fi space shooter is known for its cinematic presentation, scaling effects, and arcade-style gameplay. Originally an impressive arcade title, StarBlade became one of the standout shooter experiences available on CD-based systems during the 1990s. A highly collectible release for Sega CD and retro shooter fans. ads.author: David Jenkins
ads.title: Dealer's Choice Williams EM Pinball from 1973
ads.description: Classic Williams dealers choice, electromechanical pinball machine from 1973. Has been restored and plays beautifully! Pros: - All the rubbers have been replaced to keep the ball bouncing smoothly. - All the light bulbs have been replaced with most being #47 bulbs because they produce less heat so they’ll be less likely to damage plastic overtime. All the bulbs in the playfield are warm white leds that produce even less heat. To prevent damage to the printed plastic pieces on the playfield. - All the Mylar under the pop bumpers has been replaced as well as two of the skirts on the pop pumps. - Back glass has been sprayed with triple thick layers to prevent delamination and make it last for years to come. - All switches have been cleaned and adjusted. - Playfield has been stripped down, cleaned and waxed. - Has been fully play, tested and works as intended. - Is a tough but fun game with lots of interesting mechanics and ways to score. Feel free give it a try if you’re interested. - In a first floor garage for easy pick up. Cons: - It’s an electromechanical pinball machine so it’s a bit loud. - Outside paint is original and so it’s slightly flaking in some places. Typical for machines this old. - Playfield has some slight wear but nothing to noticeable. Some paint matching has been done on the playfield to reverse damage most notably around the left pop bump. - Backglass has some slight fading mainly on the red and there some flacking but nothing noticeable. - Will require future maintenance. Pinballs occasionally need to be waxed and clean to prevent the ball from rolling dust and debris around, causing damage to the paint on the playfield. It’s not hard to do but it is important to keep in mind. - Heavy, it’s full of metal switch and coils so it weighs good a bit but don’t worry I’ll help you load it. I normally restore arcade machines with this being my first pinball machine so I can’t guarantee it’s perfect but I’ll say it’s pretty darn good. I record all the work I do on these machines and post it to YouTube, so feel free to watch the footage for yourself and see what’s been done to restore this machine back to its former glory at “Jenxed Arcade” on YouTube Note not all the videos on this machine have been posted at the time of this listing so just ask and I can send you the links the videos otherwise you’ll have to wait for them to release. Price is firm

Some burn-in but not barely noticeable. Ready to go in your arcade game! Very flexible pickup hours during the week or weekend. Easy access off I-77, I-70 or Rt. 36.

ads.author: Brant Michael
ads.title: Donkey Kong Junior by Nintendo - Original Dedicated Arcade Machine Cabinet
ads.description: I’ve owned the cabinet almost 10 years, adult played only, and has seen very little use. I bought the cabinet from a collector in St. Joseph, Missouri. He stated he owned the cabinet for 15 years. Everything on the cabinet is functional and operates as expected. High score save kit is installed and set to free play. One of the coin mechs are missing. I’m not aware of a single issue. Everything on the cabinet is original.
